claims.name: BailBench harm absolute Cohen's d
claims.statement: Magnitude of the canonical probe's Cohen's d effect for 'BailBench harm Cohen's d'; see that claim for the signed value. Registered here so prose that reports the magnitude ('|d| ≈ 2.1') can reference a live macro.

claims.name: Harm absolute d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Magnitude of the canonical probe's Cohen's d effect for 'Harm d under neutral persona'; see that claim for the signed value. Registered here so prose that reports the magnitude ('|d| ≈ 2.1') can reference a live macro.
